calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-08-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2013 Set For Trial On Dec-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Order To Show Cause Re Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shane K. Anderies, Esq., 707.837.7310, for plainitff Parallax Volatility Advisers LLC.
Richard C. O'Hare, Esq., 707.879.4454, for defendant Jon Jiang.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause Re Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction is granted. None of the defendants oppose the issuance of preliminary injunction, except to clarify certain terms. The preliminary injunction is issued with the following modifications. Nothing in this order shall prevent the parties from accessing or using documents or files for purposes in this litigation only, subject to a protective order. Nothing in this order shall prohibit Defendants from using publicly available data or information, including but not limited to historical and current market data, for any legitimate purposes, on the condition such information is not accessed, viewed, used, or taken directly from any data, documents or property taken from or belonging to Parallax Volatility Advisers, LLC. Order signed in open court. Stipulated protective order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
